channel.title: FreeHosts Blog
channel.description: The official blog for FreeHosts — guides, comparisons, tutorials, and community spotlights about free hosting.

item.title: Mastering Git for Solo Developers
item.description: Git isn't just for teams. A solid Git workflow makes solo development faster, safer, and more organized. Here's the workflow we recommend.
item.author: shadow-gaming

item.title: Getting Started with Cloudflare Pages
item.description: Learn how to deploy your first static site on Cloudflare Pages for free. This step-by-step guide covers setup, custom domains, and CI/CD integration.
item.author: alex-chen

item.title: Vercel Announces Free Hobby Plan Upgrades for 2026
item.description: Vercel has significantly upgraded its free Hobby plan for 2026, increasing build limits, adding new regions, and introducing community analytics.
item.author: maria-rodriguez

item.title: Build a Portfolio Site with GitHub Pages
item.description: Create a professional portfolio site for free using GitHub Pages and Jekyll. Includes setup, theming, custom domains, and SEO optimization.
item.author: jordan-lee

item.title: Why Static Sites Are Making a Comeback in 2025
item.description: After years of server-side rendering dominance, static sites are experiencing a renaissance. Here's why developers are returning to simpler architectures.
item.author: alex-chen, maria-rodriguez

item.title: Best Free Hosting Platforms for Open Source Projects
item.description: A curated list of free hosting platforms that give open source projects production-grade infrastructure without the price tag.
item.author: maria-rodriguez

item.title: Setting Up a Free PostgreSQL Database with Render
item.description: Learn how to provision a free PostgreSQL database on Render, connect from your application, and manage it with popular tools.
item.author: jordan-lee

item.title: Cloudflare Workers Now Support Python Runtime
item.description: Cloudflare has added native Python support to Workers, opening serverless edge computing to one of the world's largest developer communities.
item.author: alex-chen

item.title: How to Deploy a Static Site on Netlify for Free
item.description: A complete walkthrough for deploying a static site on Netlify's free tier, from Git connection to custom domain and form handling.
item.author: shadow-gaming

item.title: Interview: Building a SaaS on Free Infrastructure
item.description: We sat down with three indie developers who built profitable SaaS products entirely on free hosting tiers. Here's how they did it.
item.author: maria-rodriguez, shadow-gaming

item.title: Free Tier vs Paid: When to Upgrade Your Hosting
item.description: Free hosting tiers are incredibly generous, but they have limits. Here's how to recognize when your project has outgrown the free tier and what to upgrade to.
item.author: shadow-gaming
